title: Add non-English national-charity funders (no paywalled aggregator)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Non-English national-charity funders are added only from open/openly-licensed sources -- no paywalled/proprietary aggregator (refused per guardrails). Binding cancer guardrails: open-access / aggregate / organization-/award-level data ONLY -- no controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA), no individual-level biobank/clinical data, no identifiable patient data; proprietary research-intelligence databases (Dimensions/WoS/Scopus/Candid) are out of scope; no medical advice or clinical interpretation. See PLAN.md.
objective: Add non-English national-charity funders sourced only from open/openly-licensed channels, with attributions recorded and the sourcing approach documented in the gaps ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-English national-charity funders added only from open/openly-licensed sources; no paywalled/proprietary aggregator is used (refused per guardrails).
Each source license-cleared in the allow-list with attribution; 100% provenance + retrievedAt.
Sourcing approach for under-covered languages/regions documented in the gaps ledger.
output: data/intl-charities/ non-English national-charity funder records, committed via PR.
